glosses.es: manual de usuario; instrucciones de uso
glosses.zh-Hans: 使用说明书; 用户手册
glosses.yue: 使用說明書; 用戶手冊
glosses.pt: manual do usuário; instruções de uso
glosses.vi: hướng dẫn sử dụng; sổ tay người dùng
glosses.ro: manual de utilizare; instrucțiuni de folosire
glosses.ja: 取扱説明書; ユーザーガイド

translations.en: I'm looking for the instruction manual.
translations.es: Estoy buscando el manual de instrucciones.
translations.it: Sto cercando il manuale di istruzioni.
translations.pt: Estou procurando o manual de instruções.
translations.vi: Tôi đang tìm cuốn sách hướng dẫn.
translations.nl: Ik ben op zoek naar de handleiding.
translations.hi: मैं निर्देश पुस्तिका ढूँढ़ रही हूँ.
translations.ja: 取扱説明書を探しています。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular, nominative; functions as the subject of the clause.
Finite main verb, present indicative, 1st person singular; transitive and selects a direct object in the accusative.
Definite article; agrees with a feminine singular noun in accusative; marks the direct object NP.
Common noun, feminine; compound (Bedienung + Anleitung); here the direct object in the accusative of 'suchen'.

sentences.target: Tom liest die Bedienungsanleitung am Küchentisch.

translations.de: Tom liest die Bedienungsanleitung am Küchentisch.
translations.en: Tom is reading the instruction manual at the kitchen table.
translations.es: Tom está leyendo el manual de instrucciones en la mesa de la cocina.
translations.fr: Tom lit le mode d'emploi à table dans la cuisine.
translations.it: Tom sta leggendo il manuale di istruzioni al tavolo della cucina.
translations.ko: 톰은 부엌 식탁에서 사용설명서를 읽고 있어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 汤姆在厨房的餐桌上看说明书。
translations.yue: 湯姆喺廚房張枱度睇說明書。
translations.ru: Том читает инструкцию за кухонным столом.
translations.pt: Tom está lendo o manual de instruções na mesa da cozinha.
translations.he: טום קורא את חוברת ההוראות ליד שולחן המטבח.
translations.tr: Tom mutfak masasında kullanma kılavuzunu okuyor.
translations.vi: Tom đang đọc sách hướng dẫn ở bàn trong bếp.
translations.ar: توم يقرأ كتيب التعليمات على طاولة المطبخ.
translations.nl: Tom leest de handleiding aan de keukentafel.
translations.uk: Том читає інструкцію за кухонним столом.
translations.hu: Tom a használati útmutatót olvassa a konyhaasztalnál.
translations.hi: टॉम रसोई की मेज पर निर्देश पुस्तिका पढ़ रहा है.
translations.pl: Tom czyta instrukcję obsługi przy kuchennym stole.
translations.el: Ο Τομ διαβάζει το εγχειρίδιο οδηγιών στο τραπέζι της κουζίνας.
translations.id: Tom sedang membaca buku petunjuk di meja dapur.
translations.ro: Tom citește manualul de instrucțiuni la masa din bucătărie.
translations.cs: Tom čte návod k použití u kuchyňského stolu.
translations.fi: Tom lukee käyttöohjetta keittiön pöydän ääressä.
translations.ja: トムはキッチンのテーブルで取扱説明書を読んでいます。

tokens.explanation: Proper noun; functions as the subject (3rd person singular) of the sentence.
Finite main verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular; transitive and takes a direct object.
Definite article; feminine singular accusative; determiner of the direct object NP.
Common noun, feminine; head of the direct object NP in the accusative.
Fused preposition+article (an + dem); introduces a prepositional phrase with dative, expressing location.
Common noun; dative singular as the object of the preposition 'an' (via 'am'), indicating the location.

sentences.target: Die Bedienungsanleitung liegt noch im Karton.

translations.de: Die Bedienungsanleitung liegt noch im Karton.
translations.en: The instruction manual is still in the box.
translations.es: El manual de instrucciones todavía está en la caja.
translations.fr: Le mode d'emploi est encore dans la boîte.
translations.it: Il manuale di istruzioni è ancora nella scatola.
translations.ru: Инструкция всё ещё лежит в коробке.
translations.pt: O manual de instruções ainda está na caixa.
translations.vi: Sách hướng dẫn vẫn còn trong hộp.
translations.ar: كتيب التعليمات ما زال داخل الصندوق.
translations.nl: De handleiding ligt nog in de doos.
translations.hu: A használati útmutató még a dobozban van.
translations.hi: निर्देश पुस्तिका अभी भी डिब्बे में है.
translations.pl: Instrukcja obsługi wciąż jest w pudełku.
translations.el: Το εγχειρίδιο οδηγιών είναι ακόμα μέσα στο κουτί.
translations.id: Buku petunjuk masih ada di dalam kotak.
translations.ro: Manualul de instrucțiuni este încă în cutie.
translations.cs: Návod k použití je pořád v krabici.
translations.ja: 取扱説明書はまだ箱の中にあります。

tokens.explanation: Definite article; feminine singular nominative; determiner of the subject NP.
Common noun, feminine; subject in the nominative.
Finite intransitive verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular; denotes a static location/state.
Adverb; modifies the verb to indicate persistence/continuation at the reference time.
Fused preposition+article (in + dem); introduces a dative NP indicating static location.
Common noun; dative singular as the object of the preposition 'in' (via 'im'), denoting the container/location.

sentences.target: Wir finden die Bedienungsanleitung online als PDF.
sentences.reading: /viːʁ ˈfɪndən diː bəˈdiːnʊŋsʔanˌlaɪ̯tʊŋ ˈɔnlaɪ̯n als peː deː ˈʔɛf/

translations.de: Wir finden die Bedienungsanleitung online als PDF.
translations.ipa: /viːʁ ˈfɪndən diː bəˈdiːnʊŋsʔanˌlaɪ̯tʊŋ ˈɔnlaɪ̯n als peː deː ˈʔɛf/
translations.en: We find the instruction manual online as a PDF.
translations.es: Encontramos el manual de instrucciones en línea en formato PDF.
translations.fr: Nous trouvons le mode d'emploi en ligne au format PDF.
translations.it: Troviamo il manuale di istruzioni online in formato PDF.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们在网上找到了说明书的PDF版。
translations.yue: 我哋喺網上搵到PDF版嘅說明書。
translations.ru: Мы нашли инструкцию онлайн в формате PDF.
translations.pt: Encontramos o manual de instruções online em PDF.
translations.he: מצאנו את חוברת ההוראות באינטרנט כקובץ PDF.
translations.tr: Kullanma kılavuzunu çevrimiçi olarak PDF şeklinde bulduk.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi tìm thấy sách hướng dẫn trên mạng dưới dạng PDF.
translations.ar: وجدنا كتيب التعليمات على الإنترنت بصيغة PDF.
translations.nl: We vonden de handleiding online als PDF.
translations.uk: Ми знайшли інструкцію онлайн у форматі PDF.
translations.hu: A használati útmutatót online, PDF formátumban találtuk meg.
translations.hi: हमने निर्देश पुस्तिका ऑनलाइन PDF रूप में ढूँढ़ ली.
translations.pl: Znaleźliśmy instrukcję obsługi w internecie w formacie PDF.
translations.el: Βρήκαμε το εγχειρίδιο οδηγιών στο διαδίκτυο σε μορφή PDF.
translations.nb: Vi fant bruksanvisningen på nettet som PDF.
translations.id: Kami menemukan buku petunjuk secara online dalam format PDF.
translations.sv: Vi hittade bruksanvisningen på nätet som PDF.
translations.ro: Am găsit manualul de instrucțiuni online în format PDF.
translations.cs: Návod k použití jsme našli online ve formátu PDF.
translations.da: Vi fandt brugsanvisningen online som PDF.
translations.ja: 取扱説明書のPDF版をオンラインで見つけました。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person plural, nominative; subject of the clause.
Finite main verb, present indicative, 1st person plural; transitive and selects a direct object.
Definite article; feminine singular accusative; determiner of the direct object NP.
Common noun, feminine; head of the direct object NP in the accusative.
Adverb; modifies the verb to indicate the medium/manner of finding.
Preposition used with a nominal complement; introduces a predicative/complement NP specifying format or role.
Common noun (acronym); complement of the preposition 'als', indicating the file format.
